full_text:
Luo Tong (Gongxu) 駱統 (公緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Luo Tong (駱統), styledGongxu (公緒), was born in Kuaiji. Vassal of Sun Quan, famed for being a poor yet honourable man, loyal to his step mother. Luo Tong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Luo Tong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
